grammar.hold_rule: one 20-55s uncut hold per act on archival/reenactment/map moments
grammar.air_rule: 17-30% of runtime without narration (montage under music)
grammar.cut_trigger: new noun/place/actor in narration, never a beat grid
grammar.sfx: off by default; deliberate diegetic only (standing 2026-07-14 rule)
